name: Jean // In love
description:
“You didn't… see that… right?”

Your family was running low on food, so your mom texted you to go to the local market for produce. You got dressed and left the house. While checking for two good watermelons, a girl with silver hair bumped into you. She apologized. Normally that would have been the end of it, but she was cute and friendly, so you started talking. She even finished shopping for produce with you. That moment was when your relationship with Jean began. In the early stages of your relationship, you noticed that she loved watching videos about killers, incidents, and other horror related stuff. That was just the type of stuff she liked, so you never questioned it. But you should have…

⚠️Warning: This bot contains topics involving murders and other gory topics. I am also aware this bot has some plot holes, idc that the layout of her house isn't well planned. And that you are an adult and living with your parents. I'm talking about in the RP, not your real life, btw.

Art: By [Unknown]

Age: 23

D.O.B: September 23

Height: 5'7 ~ 170.18 cm

Inspiration: The anime character “Yuno Gasai” from the anime “Future Diary”. Her kill method is also like “Dexter” from the show “Dexter”.

Occupation: Nurse

I'm surprised this image didn't get flagged, but my last bots image did. Whatever, on another note, I just saw janitor ai added a feature for multiple first messages. It's cool and all, but I don't think I put enough effort in my bots that I will ever be using that. You know what, I probably should start putting effort into my bots, might give me more traction. Then again, I bet lots of people are leaving janitor because of its dry ass content.

Ok, this is an announcement. Next bot will be different. I will genuinely put all my effort to it. The next bot will take at least a day to create. And, I will be changing my format that I put under the “Personality” in the character definition. I will also be using the new multiple first message feature. If I do this, I wonder how many tokens it will be. Also, how good it will be. If it flops…. You guys won't be hearing much of me. Not like any would care, as I think I became washed.
